title: Silver Number 7 Balloon Large 7th Birthday Anniversary Helium Foil Number Balloon 7 Silver / 40inch Party Deco
features: 🎉Number balloon Size:101 cm (deflated) / 85 cm (inflated); Market-preferred size for versatile decor pairings; Compatible with both air and helium inflation.
🎉Multicolored balloon: Numbers in vibrant colors for free combinations; Flexible display: wall-mounted or suspended with ropes

🎉Utility: foil number balloons elevate celebrations, promotions, and milestones by highlighting key dates, Photographs, or figures with eye-catching, versatile flair; Works seamlessly indoors and outdoors
🎉Occasion: Birthday, Celebrations, Anniversaries, Ceremonies, Corporate Events, Milestone, Wedding, New Year,etc

🎉Premium Durability: Reinforced edge-sealing technology;Fade-resistant colors and tear-resistant materials; If damaged during use,contact us with a photo for compensation. This is a decoration item, NOT A TOY.
description: Product Description You have my word: If any balloons purchased from our shop don’t last the entire party, please reach out to our after-sales team. We’ll make sure you’re satisfied with the resolution. Shining metallic number ballloon: Sleek metallic, radiant and captivating—the shining highlight of the party. Pre-inflation: 101cm Post-inflation: 85cm Compatible with both air and helium. Helium allows floating, air does not. Inflatable method: 1. Prepare an air pump or straw. 2. Insert the air pump or straw into the inflation valve. (Note: The inflation valve is located beneath the transparent film.) 3. Inflate slowly to 90% saturation, and avoid inflating to 100% saturation. Sealing method: When removing the straw, pinch both sides of the sealing strip, then slowly pull it out. Press and hold the inflation valve for 15 seconds, and it will seal automatically. If not pressed long enough, it will slowly deflate.
